text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm watching a race...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Aaand... we have our winner! Here she is, the
victory of a truly intense dead heat!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Fantastic! Races are so thrilling! While I am here, I
should take a photo to commemorate the
occasion!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you there! Would you be so kind as to take
my photo?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Please make sure you capture the racetrack
as well! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can barely keep up with what's happening, but I
take Fine Motion's picture anyway.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, what a lovely photo! This is worthy of
three reminiscent clovers!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I adore clovers, so I use them to rate any
wonderful experiences I have.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I want to gather as many clovers as I can here
before I return to Ireland.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The world outside the castle walls is so free and
fascinating! I do not often have experiences like
these, so I take many photos when I do.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Say, where do you think I should go next for some
more lovely photo opportunities?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ah, the spot where the goal enters the racers'
sight, and they begin to calculate when to make
their final move! A fine suggestion!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The sight of all the Umamusume rounding the
corner is always so delightfully impactful! It never
ceases to take my breath away!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes, if I can take a clear shot from that location,
I'm sure it will make for a wonderful memory!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ah, the looks on their faces as they strive
desperately forward with their final ounces of
energy!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Surely, there is no scene more worthy of being
immortalized! My heart is racing in anticipation!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I must find a location where I can capture a clear
shot. I wonder if that spot over there will be
good?
